channel.title: Projects on Yong-Siang Shih (施詠翔)
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Yong-Siang Shih (施詠翔)

item.title: Snappycat
item.description: The snappy files produced by Hadoop contain data headers produced by BlockCompressorStream. Each block is prepended with two 32-bit integers stating the size of the decompressed data and size of the compressed data, respectively.h Therefore, snappy library cannot directly decompress it. This command line utility handles the headers and decompresses the data without any dependencies on the Hadoop libraries.

item.title: Anobii2Goodreads
item.description: The utility could Convert exported Anobii CSV files to Goodreads CSV files for import. Automatically create new book entries for missing books at Goodreads. Crawl Anobii to obtain reading progress and insert it into Goodreads records.

item.title: Open Source Contributions
item.description: xianmin/hugo-theme-jane – A readable & concise theme for Hugo Enhances and bugfixes #76, #77, #79, #82, #83, #91, #98 RaRe-Technologies/smart_open – Utils for streaming large files Make it possible to change number of retries when reading S3 files #102 s3tools/s3cmd – Command line tool for managing Amazon S3 and CloudFront services Python 3 migration #785, #789, #806, #809 dmlc/xgboost – Scalable, Portable and Distributed Gradient Boosting Library Support different filesystems such as S3FileSystem #965 google/vim-codefmt – codefmt is a utility for syntax-aware code formatting.

item.title: CS Dream
item.description: CS Dream is a open book that introduces computer science to the general audience. The book discusses general topics such as the usage of search engines, places to find books, and the importance of English. In addition, it also introduces several courses that are usually taught at the universities. The courses covered include Assembly Language, Discrete Mathematics, Cryptography, etc.

item.title: FreeArray Input Method
item.description: An Array30 input method implementation under Linux.

item.title: Gifted
item.description: Gifted is a novel website that tells fictional stories. The stories are about how different people perceive the same situation differently. The web site utilizes Flash to create animations to accompany the stories. I have also written a post about how I created the website: 〈宏碁數位創作獎作品——「天予」之創作歷程〉.
